event: Still Life with Eel and Red Mullet
description: A still life painting depicting several fish laid out on a white cloth draped over a table against a dark brown background. A dark, sinuous eel curves across the center of the composition, its body glistening. Beside it lie one or two red mullet or similar fish with golden-orange scales and prominent heads. A kitchen knife with a dark handle rests in the foreground. At far left, the edge of a plate or bowl is visible. The brushwork is bold and assured, with rich impasto capturing the wet, reflective surfaces of the fish.
